trivia_bullets.text: Core Set 2021 sole Treefolk printing; no prior version of Gnarled Sage exists (Scryfall reprint: false). Core sets have historically included Treefolk as recurring green common slot-fillers, but this card is an original.

4/4 for five mana with Reach and a draw-two condition: becomes 4/6 with vigilance as long as you've drawn two or more cards that turn. The draw-two motif appears across multiple M21 cards, clustering the set around a draw-rewards green subtheme. EDHREC rank 26,149 (375 decks tracked) — lowest of this batch. Pauper-legal.

Art by Raoul Vitale, self-taught American oil-on-board illustrator. MTG credits since 2013 (Dragon's Maze). His Nyx Lotus original painting sold for $22,500 and sketch for $5,555 in January 2020 on the MTG Art Market. Hipsters of the Coast called him 'a master of his craft.'
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: Raoul Vitale's Nyx Lotus Sells for $22,500 (January 2020)
Hipsters of the Coast: Izzet Cluestone by Raoul Vitale (2018)

trivia_bullets.text: The Treefolk Druid type combination is rare in MTG. The Druid subtype adds synergy potential with Druid-count effects. Gnarled Sage's vigilance-on-draw-two reads mechanically as a forest elder growing alert as knowledge flows — mechanical condition and flavor identity aligned.
